hints.taming_chance_base: Percent chance per feed, from 0 to 100
hints.taming_chance_chicken: Percent chance per feed, from 0 to 100
hints.taming_chance_beef: Percent chance per feed, from 0 to 100
hints.taming_chance_hearty: Percent chance per feed, from 0 to 100
hints.taming_chance: Percent chance base used by Varasuchus taming. Legacy food taming rolls it directly; rodeo taming converts it into a smaller per-tick chance
hints.taming_chance_tropical: Percent chance per feed for Varasuchus tropical fish taming, from 0 to 100
hints.legacy_taming: true = simple food taming, false = special mechanics (rodeo/low-health)
hints.egg_hatch_chance_normal: Legacy random-tick hatch roll. Kept only for older egg configs
hints.egg_hatch_chance_thunder: Legacy thunder random-tick hatch roll. Kept only for older egg configs
hints.egg_hatch_time_ticks_normal: How long the egg takes to hatch in normal weather (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.egg_hatch_time_ticks_thunder: How long the egg takes to hatch during thunderstorms (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.egg_drop_chance: Chance from 0 to 1 for females to drop an egg on death
hints.egg_loot_pillager_outpost: Chance from 0 to 1 for an egg in pillager outpost chests
hints.egg_loot_shipwreck_treasure: Chance from 0 to 1 for an egg in shipwreck treasure chests
hints.egg_loot_ancient_city: Chance from 0 to 1 for an egg in ancient city chests
hints.egg_loot_bastion_treasure: Chance from 0 to 1 for an egg in bastion treasure chests
hints.egg_loot_nether_bridge: Chance from 0 to 1 for an egg in nether fortress chests
hints.aggressive_wild: true = wild dragons aggro on sight, false = only retaliate
hints.taming_stun_health: Health threshold for taming stun (0 = disable stun)
hints.scale_drop_chance_brush: Chance from 0 to 1 to drop this dragon's scale when brushed
hints.flying_speed: Base rider flying speed. Wild flight uses this too before any wild-only multiplier is applied
hints.wild_flying_speed_multiplier: Multiplier for wild flying speed only (1 = default, ridden flight unchanged)
hints.summon_storm_cooldown_ticks: Cooldown for Summon Storm (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.summon_storm_supercharge_ticks: How long Summon Storm supercharge lasts (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.summon_storm_supercharge_damage_multipli: Damage multiplier applied while supercharged (1 = normal damage)
hints.summon_storm_duration_ticks: How long thunderstorm weather is enforced (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.spine_drop_chance: Chance from 0 to 1 to drop a Volitans spine on qualifying combat hits
hints.fish_drop_chance: Chance from 0 to 1 for each fish type to drop on death
hints.breath_active_ticks_max: Maximum active breath duration in ticks before auto-stop (20 ticks = 1 second)
hints.breath_drain_per_tick: Breath energy drained per active tick
hints.breath_regen_per_tick: Breath energy regenerated per tick while not breathing
hints.breath_projectile_spread: Random spread applied to each breath projectile
hints.breath_projectile_speed: Base speed multiplier for breath projectiles
hints.breath_projectile_lifetime: Lifetime in ticks for each breath projectile
hints.poison_breath_poison_duration_ticks: Poison duration from poison breath in ticks (0 = disable)
hints.poison_breath_poison_level: Poison level from 0 to 4 applied by poison breath (0 = disable)
hints.poison_ball_poison_duration_ticks: Poison duration from poison ball in ticks (0 = disable)
hints.poison_ball_poison_level: Poison level from 0 to 4 applied by poison ball (0 = disable)
hints.roar_ground_poison_duration_ticks: Poison duration from grounded roar in ticks (0 = disable)
hints.roar_ground_poison_level: Poison level from 0 to 4 applied by grounded roar (0 = disable)
hints.roar_air_water_poison_duration_ticks: Poison duration from air/water roar in ticks (0 = disable)
hints.roar_air_water_poison_level: Poison level from 0 to 4 applied by air/water roar (0 = disable)
